text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're a few days into summer camp, and I find that it's totally silent
tonight as I go to get some water. The whole camp must be sleeping
soundly after training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But as I walk through the eerily empty lobby in search of a drink, I
feel a chill run up my spine...
I... cuuurse... youuu...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, just the reaction I was hoping for. You scare easily, huh,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, don't look at me like that. I was only playing. Forgive me?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't get to sleep and was bored out of my mind. That is, until
you came along!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
No need to worry—I'm not nervous or anything. But this might be the
perfect opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Come for a walk with me? Let's enjoy the night air.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ah, what a wonderful evening. I haven't had a night to myself like this
since we got here.
choice_data_list: You didn't check out the festival or fireworks?
You didn't check out the festival or fireworks?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I may be a student, but my duties as a dorm leader are many. Some of
my darling ponies need lots of comforting to sleep in unfamiliar beds.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But just for tonight, I'd like to forget my responsibilities and have you
all to myself.
choice_data_list: You're not joking again, are you?
You're not joking again, are you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, I'm serious. There's something I want to show you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Say, let's race to the beach.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Surprised as I am, I follow after her as fast as I can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She really deserves her nickname, the Black Meteor. Her running is
elegant, yet powerful. There's not an ounce of hesitation in it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And it's wrapped in a relentless passion to race.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The sound of the rippling waves is so comforting. This really is a
wonderful night.
choice_data_list: What's going on with you, Fuji?
What's going on with you, Fuji?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What do you think? I wanted you to see the fruits of our training here.
I've been having the time of life running these last few days.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: So? Did my running excite you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I need to tell you something. It's important.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I've been thinking ever since that student got injured and had to
leave the academy. She entrusted her dream to me, as you may recall.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thinking of how I can carry on her dream has confounded me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But when we saw that play together, I realized what I need to do.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki, the greatest entertainer, who brings joy to the world...
That's who I want to become.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But this dream of mine continues beyond that.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Making people happy, healing their woes—that's what I want to do.
And I also want to carry on their dreams when they themselves can't.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: For that purpose, I cannot lose to anyone!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to continue to run—always—and win as many races as I can!
And when I rise as a star...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'm going to obtain every racer's dream—proof of being the greatest.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I will win the Triple Crown. That will be the ultimate realization of my dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Crown is a title given to runners who triumph in the three
most prestigious races—the Satsuki Sho, the Japanese Derby, and the
Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the history of the Twinkle Series, only a rare few have ever
achieved it. It's truly the greatest honor every racer aspires to!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That is what I swear to you tonight. I need you to act as my witness.
choice_data_list: As your trainer, I accept your vow.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: There. Now that it's in words, I must make it come true. To fail to meet your expectations would be my greatest defeat!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So I have to start training seriously, and I need you to keep me on my
path!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, I watch as she practices for a while, and I see a new light
of passion burning in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Phew... I want to keep going, but I'm afraid it'll be light soon.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Nevertheless, a great dream lies before me. I feel I can almost reach
out and snatch it from the very air.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: All I want to do is keep running.
choice_data_list: What can I do to help you achieve your dream?
What can I do to help you achieve your dream?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'll ask you again, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Guide me on my path. Be my number-one supporter, my
partner—always stay by my side!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Then on my name as the greatest entertainer, I promise to bring you the most joy of all.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You'll have a front-row seat to my marvelous miracle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our partnership feels like it's just beginning. From here on out, we're
going after the biggest dream our hearts can imagine.
